commands.review_summary:
The branch updates the changelog, website install copy, Homebrew release playbook, and all site locale install messages to describe the official Homebrew cask as universal.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a runtime bug; the stale-docs mismatch is source-verifiable because current main says Homebrew is Apple Silicon-only while the current official cask uses the universal archive without an architecture restriction.

target.title: docs: clarify universal Homebrew cask
target.body:
Closes #1193

## Summary

- Describe the official Homebrew cask as universal on Intel and Apple silicon.
- Update the English website fallback and all 21 localized `hero.fineprint` / `detail.installBody` messages.
- Remove the stale arm64-only instruction from the Homebrew release playbook.
- Add changelog credit for the original Intel support report.

## Proof

Exact reviewed head: `49cbeaea364f82e4cec627fbe670ef05cb5ed4b0`

- Current official cask v0.36.1 downloads `CodexBar-macos-universal-#{version}.zip`, requires macOS Sonoma, and has no architecture restriction.
- `node Scripts/check-site-locales.mjs` passes: 21 locales, 50 site messages.
- `make docs-list` passes.
- `make check` passes with zero SwiftFormat or SwiftLint findings.
- Exact-head autoreview reports no actionable findings, confidence 0.90.
- Existing-profile Chrome visual smoke passes for English, German, and RTL Arabic: updated hero/install copy renders without clipping; provider grid, install cards, and RTL layout remain intact. The post-rebase site content is byte-identical.
target.author: steipete
